name: Pine Nut Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook the ground beef and onion over medium heat until the onions are tender.
2. Add the concentrated chicken base, garlic powder, and pepper to the skillet. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, stirring occasionally, until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Remove the skillet from the heat and stir in the pine nuts.
4. Add the orzo to the skillet and gently toss to coat with the dressing.
